name: ASRock B760M-H/M.2 Micro-ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700 - Supports DDR5-7200(OC) - 1x PCIe 4.0 x16 - 1x PCIe 3.0 x1 - M.2 Key E for WiFi - 2x M.2 Slots - USB 3.2 Gen1 Type-C+A - DisplayPort 1.4 - HDMI 2.1 - Realtek Gigabit LAN (B760M-H/M.2)
shortName: ASRock B760M-H/M.2 Micro-ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700 - Supports
description: Micro-ATX motherboard for Intel 12th/13th gen with B760 chipset and DDR5 memory support.
